## What this PR does

## Type

- [ ] ➕ New question(s)
- [ ] 📚 New / updated resource(s)
- [ ] ✍️ New / improved content or worked answer
- [ ] 🏢 Company loop update
- [ ] 🐛 Fix (broken link, error, stale fact)

## Quality checklist (required)

- [ ] **Provenance** — every "real question" is labeled ✅ Reported (with a source URL) or 🔮 Representative.
- [ ] **Links** — every new link is annotated (one line *why*) and typed (📄 📘 📰 🎬 🧑‍🏫 🛠️ 💻).
- [ ] **License** — any adapted text/code is from MIT/Apache/CC0 and attributed; CC-BY-SA / autogen CC-BY-4.0 is link-only.
- [ ] **Repos** — new repo links note license + approx stars.
- [ ] **Dated** — new facts reflect 2026; I didn't ship anything I couldn't check.
- [ ] **Style** — matches the house style (answer-first, tables over prose, senior voice, no fluff).
- [ ] I ran a quick self-check that internal links resolve.
